title: Multi-Line Content Distribution
description: Create a flex container (500px wide, 400px tall) with 8 items (100px each) wrapped to multiple lines. Use align-content: center to center the lines vertically.
hint: Use `flex-wrap: wrap`, `flex: 0 0 100px` on items, and `align-content: center`.

solution.css:
.container { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-content: center; width: 500px; min-height: 400px; gap: 10px; background: #2d2d44; }
.container div { flex: 0 0 100px; height: 80px; background: #4ecdc4; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }

title: Compare align-content vs align-items
description: Create two side-by-side containers with the same 8 items. One uses align-content: center, the other uses align-items: center. Notice the difference.
hint: Both have `flex-wrap: wrap`. First has `align-content: center`, second has `align-items: center`.
